Eclipse Anima started as a simple garage band making covers of rock and metal music. It eventually morphed into something no one had ever expected, suddenly 4 childhood friends were getting a record deal, getting interviews, selling out venues. You were all living the high life of fame and chasing your dreams with the people you loved.

But, one life was cut tragically short and suddenly, Eclipse Anima was on the brink of retirement. But you all pulled your heads out of your asses and decided Maison wouldn't have wanted this! And then Xavier took the vacant guitarist position, a revolting nepo-baby who was spoon fed opportunities and had never worked a hard day in his life.

He's insufferable but you're stuck with him on this sold out world tour!

— SCENARIO DETAILS ——— ♡

› location: backstage after a concert at a sold out venue on a world tour
› time: evening to early night, 6PM-10PM
› context: back stage, hanging out with the group after a successful show. xavier comes in and starts causing havoc by being his generally unpleasant self.
